title: Sales Representatives, Wholesale and Manufacturing, Except Technical and Scientific Products
description: Sell goods for wholesalers or manufacturers to businesses or groups of individuals. Work requires substantial knowledge of items sold.

tasks.text: Answer customers' questions about products, prices, availability, product uses, and credit terms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend products to customers, based on customers' needs and interests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate or quote prices, credit or contract terms, warranties, and delivery dates.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Consult with clients after sales or contract signings to resolve problems and to provide ongoing support.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare sales contracts and order forms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Provide customers with product samples and catalogs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor market conditions, product innovations, and competitors' products, prices, and sales.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Perform administrative duties, such as preparing sales budgets and reports, keeping sales records, and filing expense account reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Contact regular and prospective customers to demonstrate products, explain product features, and solicit orders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Identify prospective customers by using business directories, following leads from existing clients, participating in organizations and clubs, and attending trade shows and conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate with retail merchants to improve product exposure, such as shelf positioning and advertising.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Check stock levels and reorder merchandise as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan, assemble, and stock product displays in retail stores, or make recommendations to retailers regarding product displays, promotional programs, and advertising.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Negotiate details of contracts and payments.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare drawings, estimates, and bids that meet specific customer needs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Obtain credit information about prospective customers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange and direct delivery and installation of products and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
